text:
"Angel of Doom" is a song from the film Evangelion: 1.0 You Are (Not) Alone. It is track 21 in the album Music from Evangelion: 1.0 You Are (Not) Alone. https://vgmdb.net/album/19692 

In the film, the song is featured after the Sixth Angel retaliates from an attack from the positron cannon, and it plays all the way until the Angel is defeated.

Lyrics

 
The beginning of the end, dark as clouds of scorn 
Pouring out like prophets of doom they do forewarn 
The beginning of the end, dark as clouds of scorn 

Angels of Doom come calling, with no mercy 
No fear, no heart, no judgement, no clemency 

The beginning of the end, dark as clouds of scorn 
Pouring out like prophets of doom they do forewarn
Angels of Doom, like evil messengers deliver misery
The beginning of the end, dark as clouds of scorn
Angels of Doom, like evil messengers deliver misery
Pouring out like prophets of doom they do forewarn
